name: merlinthedev848/merlin-spellcaster
description: Merlin Spellcaster — Open Source Email Marketing Platform (Mautic × Listmonk hybrid)

suggest.phpmailer/phpmailer: For advanced SMTP delivery (^6.9). Run: composer require phpmailer/phpmailer
suggest.ext-apcu: For in-memory settings caching (APCu). Improves response times significantly.
suggest.ext-curl: For webhook delivery and external API calls.
